scripts.dev:start: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- sh -c 'bunx --bun ng serve --port "$APP_HOST_PORT"'
scripts.test:e2e: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=local-chrome-baseline
scripts.test:e2e:ui: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:integration: bun run env:runtime && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=local-chrome-integration --project=docs-integration
scripts.test:e2e:create-account: bun run env:runtime && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images dotenv -c dev -- playwright test tests/specs/profile/create-account.spec.ts tests/docs/users/create-account.doc.ts --project=local-chrome-integration --project=docs-integration --grep '@needs-auth0-management'
scripts.test:e2e:esncard-provider: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test tests/specs/profile/user-profile-esncard-provider.spec.ts --project=local-chrome-baseline --grep '@esncard-provider'
scripts.test:e2e:authenticated-viewports: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test tests/specs/admin/admin-viewports.spec.ts tests/specs/admin/general-settings.spec.ts tests/specs/admin/global-admin-tenants.spec.ts tests/specs/admin/roles-viewports.spec.ts tests/specs/events/event-viewports.spec.ts tests/specs/finance/finance-viewports.spec.ts tests/specs/internal/members-hub-viewports.spec.ts tests/specs/profile/user-profile-viewports.spec.ts tests/specs/scanning/scanner-viewports.spec.ts tests/specs/templates/template-viewports.spec.ts --project=local-chrome-baseline --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:mcp-browser-authenticated-plann: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test tests/setup/mcp-browser-authenticated.seed.ts --project=mcp-browser-authenticated-planner --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:layout-helper: bun run env:runtime && NO_WEBSERVER=true dotenv -c dev -- playwright test tests/specs/smoke/page-layout-helper.test.ts --project=local-chrome-baseline --no-deps
scripts.test:e2e:public-general-viewports: bun run env:runtime && NO_WEBSERVER=true dotenv -c dev -- playwright test tests/specs/smoke/public-general-viewports.spec.ts --project=local-chrome-baseline --workers=1 --no-deps
scripts.test:e2e:docs: bun run env:runtime && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=docs-baseline
scripts.test:e2e:docs:publish: bun run env:runtime && DOCS_OUT_DIR=/Users/hedde/code/evorto-pages/apps/documentation/src/app/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=/Users/hedde/code/evorto-pages/apps/documentation/public/docs dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=docs-baseline
scripts.db:push: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- drizzle-kit push --force
scripts.db:studio: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- drizzle-kit studio
scripts.db:reset: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- drizzle-kit push --force && dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/database.ts
scripts.docker:check: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/testing/runtime-preflight.ts docker
scripts.docker:ps: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose ps
scripts.docker:stop: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down
scripts.docker:reset: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down
scripts.docker:resume: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --no-recreate -d
scripts.docker:start: bun run docker:reset && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build -d
scripts.docker:start:watch: bun run docker:reset && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build -w
scripts.docker:start:foreground: bun run docker:reset && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build
scripts.docker:webserver: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose rm --force && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build
scripts.deps:update:drizzle: bun add drizzle-orm@rc && bun add -D drizzle-seed@rc drizzle-kit@rc
scripts.ops:sentry:sourcemaps: sentry-cli sourcemaps inject --org lukas-heddendorp --project evorto ./dist && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org lukas-heddendorp --project evorto ./dist
